result.stdout:
trwdog
Copyright (c) 2023 Ken Domino
# trwdog

## Summary

Kill a program that runs too long

## Description

Execute a command with a watchdog timer.

## Usage

    trwdog <arg>+

## Examples

    trwdog make test

## Current version

0.23.43 Fixes to trgen templates.

## License

The MIT License

SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN THE SOFTWARE.


  -v, --verbose    
  -t, --timeout    Max time in seconds for command to run
  --version        
  --help           Display this help screen.
  --version        Display version information.
